title: Ta Jia
content:
Ta Jia
 is the 
Ancient Devil
 trapped in Celestial Emperor 
Qing Lin
’s famous bottle world inside the 
East Demon Spirit Sea
.

Appearance
[
]

He looks pale with sunken eyes and gives off a frightening aura.

Background
[
]

In the past, after the events of the 
Heavenly Madness
, Qing Lin was survived with injuries and escaped to his Celestial Spirit Heaven Realm. However, there he found an Ancient Devil and an 
Ancient Demon
 waiting to ambush him. He split the ancient demon into nine parts and trapped the ancient devil inside his bottle world before rushing to the fifth cave to enter closed-door cultivation to recuperate.

History
[
]

Wang Lin
 fought against a scattered devil of Ta Jia in the Ancient Battleground close to 
Fire Demon Country
. 
Bei Lou
 helped him trap the scattered devil.

Many years later when Wang Lin returned to the East Demon Spirit Sea and opened the fifth cave, Ta Jia made an appearance. He was hell-bent on killing Wang Lin to absorb the latter's Ancient God bloodline.
